name: Web Development
student_summary: Build the websites and web apps people use every day.
overview: Build the websites and web apps people use every day. Web Development sits in the Software & Applications family of Technology & Computing. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You love making new things and expressing original ideas
You notice the small things others miss
who_should_avoid: Intense competition drains you — entry here is a contest
daily_responsibilities: Collaborate with your team using frontend frameworks
Keep improving at apis — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Office or fully remote — laptop work with flexible location
problem_solving_style: Creative — explore, prototype, iterate on ideas
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: Demand is booming: opportunities across India and beyond
A broad Software & Applications foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Fierce competition for the best seats and roles
Routine tasks are being automated — you must keep moving up the value chain
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Web Development is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of frontend frameworks
projects: Beginner: explore html/css/javascript with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using JavaScript
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Software Engineering: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Mobile App Development: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward UX & Interaction Design: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Web Development pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹35 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Computer Science, Mathematics. Typical degrees: B.Tech/BCA, Any degree + portfolio. Alternatives exist: bootcamps + a strong project portfolio.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Web Development evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Web Development is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
